zh.lifeSummary: 當Alais de France於1160年10月3日出生在法國時，她的父親Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France41歲，母親Constance de Castile20歲。她於1195年8月20日與William IV Count of Ponthieu在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年1月在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alais de France于1160年10月3日出生在法国时，她的父亲Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France41岁，母亲Constance de Castile20岁。她于1195年8月20日与William IV Count of Ponthieu在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年1月在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Alais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Alais de France was born on 3 October 1160, in France, her father, Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France, was 41 and her mother, Constance de Castile, was 20. She married William IV Count of Ponthieu on 20 August 1195, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in January 1220, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: Île de la Cité, Paris, Île-de-France, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alais de France est née le 3 octobre 1160, à France, son père, Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Constance de Castile, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William IV Count of Ponthieu le 20 août 1195, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en janvier 1220, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: Île de la Cité, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Alais de France am 3. Oktober 1160 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France 41 und ihre Mutter Constance de Castile 20. Sie hat am 20. August 1195 in England William IV Count of Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Januar 1220 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alais de France è nata il il 3 ottobre 1160 nel Francia, sua padre, Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Constance de Castile, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William IV Count of Ponthieu il 20 agosto 1195, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel gennaio 1220, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alais de Franceが1160年10月3日にフランスで生まれた時，父Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de Franceは41歳，母Constance de Castileは20歳であった。1195年8月20日にイギリスでWilliam IV Count of Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1220年1月に故郷で59歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメアルゴウレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 i일 데 라 시트e
ko.lifeSummary: Alais de France(이)가 1160년 10월 3일 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Castile(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1195년 8월 20일 영국에서 William IV Count of Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜 아굴스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alais de France nasceu em 3 de outubro de 1160, em França, seu pai, Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Castile, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William IV Count of Ponthieu em 20 de agosto de 1195, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1220, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Argoules, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: iл де ла ситe, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alais de France родилась 3 октября 1160 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Constance de Castile, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William IV Count of Ponthieu 20 августа 1195 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла январь 1220 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности аргоулесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alais de France nació el 3 de octubre de 1160, en Francia, su papá, Louis VII 'le Jeune' roi de France, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Constance de Castile, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William IV Count of Ponthieu el 20 de agosto de 1195, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en enero de 1220, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
